caption:
Some things don't need to shout to be heard — they just catch the light.

These new arrivals feel like the first warm days of the year: layered, unhurried, full of quiet colour. Blue topaz falling like water, semiprecious stones threaded onto silk like a secret, a long cascade of mixed gems that tells a whole story before you've even said a word. Jewellery that asks to be worn close to the skin and kept there.

Only at Blink
